problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
hypothesis: Bacteriophage surface display for targeting may resolve What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Accelerated degradation study with 30 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
